subscribe.placeholder.context: Placeholder text in email input field

subscribe.loading.message: Storing at the speed of light

unsubscribe.intro.message: Enter your email address to unsubscribe from all newsletters.
unsubscribe.intro.context: Instructional text above the unsubscribe email input

unsubscribe.button.title.context: Title/tooltip attribute for the unsubscribe enter button

unsubscribe.error.invalidEmail.message: Please enter a valid email address.
unsubscribe.error.invalidEmail.context: Validation error shown when no valid email was entered

unsubscribe.loading.context: Message shown while the unsubscribe request is in flight

unsubscribe.success.context: Success message shown after a successful unsubscribe

unsubscribe.error.generic.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
unsubscribe.error.generic.context: Generic error shown when the unsubscribe request fails
